name: dali-preview
description: Live UI preview for Tizen DALi applications. Preview your dali-ui C++ code in real-time within VS Code.

walkthroughs.title: Get started with DALi Preview
walkthroughs.description: Set up your runtime (Docker or Native) and render your first DALi preview in 5 minutes.

steps.title: Welcome
steps.description:
Quick tour of how DALi Preview works, plus the two runtime options.
[Open Documentation](command:dali.showReadme)

steps.title: Choose Your Runtime
steps.description:
Pick **Docker (Recommended)** if you don't have DALi installed — the runtime ships as a pre-built container image. Pick **Native** if you already have DALi at /opt/dali or similar.
[Use Docker (Recommended)](command:dali.useDockerRuntime)
[Use Native DALi](command:dali.useNativeRuntime)

steps.title: Install Docker (Recommended path)
steps.description:
Skip if you picked Native in step 2. Pre-fills the install command in a terminal — sudo password once. Grants this session access immediately (setfacl) — **no reboot or reload needed**.
[Install via Terminal](command:dali.installDocker)
[Verify Docker Access](command:dali.verifyDocker)

steps.title: Download DALi Runtime Image
steps.description:
Pulls the ~290 MB runtime image from GHCR with a progress bar. Verify Docker (step 3) auto-prompts this — or run it directly here. Subsequent previews use the cached image, so this happens only once per version.
[Download Runtime Image](command:dali.pullRuntimeImage)

steps.title: Configure Native DALi (alternative path)
steps.description:
Skip if you picked Docker in step 2. Point the extension at your DALi install prefix (the directory containing `lib/libdali2-core.so`).
[Configure Native DALi](command:dali.useNativeRuntime)

steps.title: Open a Sample
steps.description:
Final step. Drops a small `hello-dali.preview.dali.cpp` into your workspace and opens it. Hit Ctrl+S to render — should appear in ~1 second since the image is already cached.
[Open Sample](command:dali.openSample)

daliPreview.daliPrefix.description: Path to the DALi installation prefix directory (containing lib/ and include/). Leave empty to use the system default.

daliPreview.runtimeMode.description: Where preview builds run. 'docker' (default) uses a containerized DALi runtime — no host install needed, just Docker. 'native' uses the host DALi install (manual setup); only choose this if you already have DALi at /opt/dali or similar.

daliPreview.dockerImage.description: Container image used when runtimeMode is 'docker'. Tags are appended automatically (e.g. ':dali_2.5.18'). Default points to a developer-maintained image on GHCR; once dalihub org allows public packages, switch to ghcr.io/dalihub/dali-preview-runtime.

daliPreview.daliVersionTag.description: Image tag selecting the DALi version. Use 'latest' to follow the rolling tag, or pin a specific tag (e.g. 'tizen_10.0_release'). Only used when runtimeMode is 'docker'.

daliPreview.runtimeUpdatePolicy.description: How to handle a newer DALi runtime image in the registry (checked once per day in docker mode, via digest comparison). 'off': never check. 'notify' (default): show a notification + status-bar badge when an update is available — you click to apply it. 'auto': download and apply the update automatically in the background.

daliPreview.background.description: Background style for the preview panel.

daliPreview.livePreview.description: Enable live preview: automatically re-render as you type using a debounce interval.

daliPreview.livePreviewDebounce.description: Debounce interval in milliseconds for live preview. 0 = update on every keystroke (best with the parser fast path, ~100ms per update). Raise this if you're on the slow harness fallback path or want to coalesce multiple rapid edits.

daliPreview.fontDirectories.description: Directories containing custom TTF/OTF font files. Fonts in these directories are registered via FontClient::AddCustomFontDirectory and can be referenced by filename in @preview-config (e.g. font=NotoSansKR.ttf).

daliPreview.vncPort.description: Starting TCP port for x11vnc (VNC server) in interactive mode. Auto-increments if port is in use. (default: 5900)

daliPreview.websocketPort.description: Starting WebSocket port for websockify proxy in interactive mode. Auto-increments if port is in use. (default: 6080)

daliPreview.sdbPath.description: Path to the sdb (Smart Development Bridge) executable. Leave empty to use 'sdb' from PATH.

daliPreview.tizenSysroot.description: Path to the Tizen sysroot for cross-compilation. Required for ARM device builds. Leave empty to use the host compiler.

daliPreview.targetDevice.description: Default SDB device serial. Set automatically when you run 'DALi Preview: Select Target Device'.

daliPreview.fontDirectories.description: List of directories containing custom font files for preview rendering.

daliPreview.logLevel.description: Log verbosity level for the DALi Preview output channel. Use 'trace' for AI-friendly structured JSON diagnostics.

daliPreview.disablePreviewServer.description: Diagnostic-only. When true, skip the long-running preview-server / dlopen / parser fast paths and always run the full g++ harness compile (~1100ms). Useful for measuring the slow path.

scripts.test:release: npm run test:unit && npm run test:click-to-code
